phase_details.label: Platform Contact
phase_details.comment: Single platform, pseudonymous approach. Gate: Victim declines or blocks

phase_details.label: Normalization & Trust
phase_details.comment: Flattery to disclosed vulnerability, reciprocal disclosure, normalization of sexual content. Gate: Victim reports to trusted adult

phase_details.label: First Compliance
phase_details.comment: First explicit request fulfilled; prior normalization made refusal psychologically costly

phase_details.label: Escalating Solicitation
phase_details.comment: Directed production, CSAM produced as escalation instrument not coercion endpoint. Gate: Peer or parent detects contact

phase_details.label: Material Retained
phase_details.comment: CSAM held as record of escalation. Gate: Victim does not appear at meeting

phase_details.label: Meeting → Physical Contact
phase_details.comment: Terminal state — offense progresses to physical terminus; does not cycle

phase_details.label: Visual Profile Targeting
phase_details.comment: Instagram visual profiles + algorithmic surfacing

phase_details.label: DM Coercion
phase_details.comment: Instagram DM with disappearing messages option

phase_details.label: Migration to Production Channel
phase_details.comment: Instagram → Messenger; severs evidence trail; accesses live video capability

phase_details.label: Live Directed Production
phase_details.comment: Offender commands; victim performs; session recorded including without victim's knowledge

phase_details.label: Media Capture
phase_details.comment: Abuse converted to persistent artifact

phase_details.label: Archive as Ongoing Leverage
phase_details.comment: Each session adds to archive; harm persists as leverage for future sessions

phase_details.label: Persistent CSAM Archive
phase_details.comment: Harm does not end when contact does

phase_details.label: Impersonation Contact at Scale
phase_details.comment: 80+ Snapchat, 40+ Instagram accounts

phase_details.label: Deception & Identity Fabrication
phase_details.comment: False peer identity

phase_details.label: First Image — Asymmetry Created
phase_details.comment: CSAM obtained; victim cannot undo

phase_details.label: Threat Delivered
phase_details.comment: Threat to expose to social network

phase_details.label: Self-Sustaining Coercion Loop
phase_details.comment: Daily quotas; each compliance produces new material extending leverage; account churn after bans

phase_details.label: Network Distribution & Recruitment
phase_details.comment: Material to co-conspirators gated behind harassment; victims recruit other victims

phase_details.label: Perpetual Re-Contact
phase_details.comment: No closure; cycle ends only at apprehension or material removal

enterprise.title: ENTERPRISE
enterprise.citation: United States v. Bermudez et al. (E.D.N.Y. 1:25-cr-00361)

phase_details.label: Gaming Platform Funnel
phase_details.comment: CS:GO, Roblox; in-game chat; pseudonymous gaming identities. Enterprise role: Recruiters

phase_details.label: Enterprise Recruitment
phase_details.comment: Discord invite; role assignment; victims recruited by coerced existing victims. Enterprise role: Coordinators

phase_details.label: Parallel Grooming
phase_details.comment: Role-specialized coordinators; multiple victims simultaneously. Enterprise role: Coordinators

phase_details.label: Migration to Operational HQ
phase_details.comment: Gaming → Discord locked channels. Enterprise role: Coordinators

phase_details.label: Parallel Directed Production
phase_details.comment: Coordinators direct producers; producers direct victims; simultaneous across multiple victims. Enterprise role: Producers

phase_details.label: Gated Distribution
phase_details.comment: Discord servers + DMs; harassment access gates; distributed storage across members. Enterprise role: Distributors

phase_details.label: Threats, Swatting & Doxing
phase_details.comment: Role-specialized threat actors; physical safety threatened; self-harm induced. Enterprise role: Threat actors

phase_details.label: Permanent Distributed Record
phase_details.comment: No single seizure recovers all copies

phase_details.label: Grindr Contact
phase_details.comment: Victim identification via dating/hookup platform (Grindr); pseudonymous adult-minor contact

phase_details.label: Vulnerability Grooming
phase_details.comment: Financial and electronics inducement, secrecy demands, exploitation of financial vulnerability; persistent solicitation via SMS

phase_details.label: Commercial Sexual Exploitation
phase_details.comment: Sex trafficking of minors (5 charged victims); financial inducement, transportation, drug provision alleged

phase_details.label: Multi-Victim Sustained Operation
phase_details.comment: Movement and re-contact across victims and jurisdictions; Snapchat/Instagram for ongoing coercion (2019-07 through 2022-12-14)

phase_details.label: Sustained Commercial Exploitation
phase_details.comment: Interstate trafficking continuum across five minor victims until arrest

phase_details.label: Cross-Border Social Media Contact
phase_details.comment: Wisconsin defendant to Philippines facilitator via social media; interstate and foreign commerce element

phase_details.label: Facilitator Grooming & Payment Negotiation
phase_details.comment: Sexual preference questions, pose instructions, money offers to induce minor compliance via third party

phase_details.label: Third-Party Paid Production
phase_details.comment: Facilitator produces video at defendant request after money transfer; victim abroad, defendant domestic

phase_details.label: Material Retained & Repeat Solicitation
phase_details.comment: Video recovered from facilitator account and defendant phone; additional paid image/video requests documented

phase_details.label: Federal Conviction — Enticement
phase_details.comment: Terminal state — 2422(b) plea; original 2251 production count dismissed; 156-month sentence

phase_details.label: Grindr Catfish Contact
phase_details.comment: Posed as 18-year-old; solicited explicit images from purported minors on dating app

phase_details.label: CP Group Participation
phase_details.comment: WhatsApp CP group membership; normalized exchange of child sexual abuse material

phase_details.label: Migration to Encrypted Stack
phase_details.comment: Wickr, Snapchat, Telegram under shared handle; evasion and distribution infrastructure

phase_details.label: Omegle → Kik → Snapchat Funnel
phase_details.comment: Live-stream discovery; username exchange; persistent Snapchat contact with MV1

phase_details.label: Snapchat Directed Production
phase_details.comment: Knew victim age 12-13; insisted until explicit images produced; corroborated by device artifacts

phase_details.label: Device CP Archive
phase_details.comment: 1800+ images and 800+ videos across two Samsung devices; receipt and distribution counts

phase_details.label: Persistent CSAM Archive
phase_details.comment: Terminal state — production + receipt/distribution plea; 480-month custody; forfeiture ordered

phase_details.label: Kik Catfish Persona Contact
phase_details.comment: Fake teenage-girl Kik persona (complaint: 'Amy Jennings', account jennings6ger); cross-border contact with MV1 (Canada); nude image grooming

phase_details.label: Third-Party Coercion Funnel
phase_details.comment: Fake persona threatens online exposure unless MV1 contacts adult male; intermediary coercion pattern

phase_details.label: Kik → FaceTime Migration
phase_details.comment: Live video call attempted after Kik grooming; ephemeral channel for directed on-camera conduct

phase_details.label: Instagram Modeling Lure
phase_details.comment: MV2 discovers defendant via Instagram; modeling-agent pretext; age 16 disclosed

phase_details.label: Dual-Persona Coercion Cycle
phase_details.comment: Same defendant runs fake Kik persona and 'Joe' identity; fake payment narrative; exposure threats on MV2 path

phase_details.label: Self-Harm & Directed Production
phase_details.comment: Coerced self-harm and body-written demands; explicit images and FaceTime sessions with MV2

phase_details.label: Kik CP Receipt Archive
phase_details.comment: Hundreds of images/videos exchanged on Kik; device seizure ties accounts to defendant

phase_details.label: Receipt Conviction
phase_details.comment: Terminal state — §2252 receipt plea; production counts dismissed; 235-month sentence
